note: Adult-audience event sources (breweries, comedy clubs, music venues, 21+ festivals, brewery calendars, etc). Every event from a source listed here is automatically tagged audiences: ['adults']. Keep kid-facing libraries / museums / family farms in event-sources.json. Source schema is identical to event-sources.json — see scripts/eventPipeline.mjs.

sources.name: East Bay Regional Park District Bird & Butterfly Festival
DNA Lounge
sources.notes: Official venue-published ICS feed (linked from dnalounge.com/calendar). Verified 2026-06-10: 121 upcoming dated events. Club nights, live shows, Bootie mashups, Mortified.

sources.name: Verdi Club
sources.notes: WordPress Events Calendar ICS export. Verified 2026-06-10: 15 upcoming (milongas, salsa, queer line dancing, supper-club nights). Feed includes occasional 'Private Event' placeholders the ICS extractor cannot filter.

sources.name: Yerba Buena Gardens Festival
sources.notes: Events page embeds schema.org Event JSON-LD; extracted 67 upcoming on 2026-06-10. Free outdoor music/dance May-Oct. A few listings are titled '(Kids' Show)'; the json-ld path has no exclude filter, so they ride along tagged adults.

sources.name: SFMOMA Events
sources.notes: Adults mirror of kids sfmoma-events: includePattern '.' bypasses the family-signal gate, excludePattern drops family programming. Verified 2026-06-10: 8 upcoming (Rooftop Radio, Atria: Live, book club, film).

sources.name: California Academy of Sciences NightLife

officialRecurringEvents.title: NightLife at the California Academy of Sciences
officialRecurringEvents.description: Adults-only (21+) Thursday night at the Academy: music, themed programming, cocktails, and after-hours access to the aquarium, planetarium, and rainforest.

sources.notes: Weekly Thursday 21+ institution modeled as four monthly nth-Thursday configs (officialRecurringEvents has no weekly frequency; fifth Thursdays are skipped). Fail-closed on page text gates. Verified 2026-06-10: page live, gates match, 5 events in 30-day window.

sources.name: Friday Nights at OMCA
sources.notes: Adults mirror of kids omca-family-events; tribe category 10 is 'Friday Nights at OMCA' (free 5-9pm block party with live music, Off the Grid food trucks, bar). Verified 2026-06-10: 2 published upcoming (Kim Nalley Band Jun 12, The Seshen Jun 26).
